title: Astonish Protect and Care Kind to Skin Moisturising Anti-Bacterial Hand Wash Soap, Peony Bloom, 600ml

features: Removes 99.9% of Bacteria: Specialised anti-bacterial formula quickly eliminates germs and bugs, leaving your hands hygienically clean, keeping you and your family safe and protected
Kind to Skin: Astonish hand-wash is perfectly suitable for all skin types being soft and gentle on skin. Plus, Astonish is proud to be cruelty free and vegan friendly
Fresh Scent: Lather your skin in Astonish’s iconic floral scent with every pump of hand-wash leaving your hands smelling delightful and neutralising malodours
Easy to Use: Astonish’s large simple pump bottle allows a straight-forward hassle-free use. Perfect for all the family
Vegan: Here at Astonish, we care about our impact and the environment, that’s why all of our products are vegan and cruelty-free
description: Product Description Here at Astonish we are proud of our products. Whatever your cleaning problem we aim to have a helpful cleaning solution even on hands. Now we’re not saying that we can work miracles, let’s be realistic cleaning can on occasions be hard work, but we’ve taken the time to ensure we’ve developed products that get the job done right, nothing less. Protect and care is our germ removing variant especially developed to remove 99.9% of bacteria, dirt, and germs. With the amazing added benefit of an antibacterial action, your hands will be left hygienically clean. Banishing bad odours on your skin makes this ideal for use in food preparation. Added in essential moisturisers, leave your treasured hands feeling soft and nourished. All round protection for the whole family with three bottles to keep you hands clean for longer. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium laureth sulfate, Sodium chloride, Cocamide DEA, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium benzoate, Glycol Distearate, Glycerin, Parfum, Citric Acid, Glycol stearate, Lactic Acid ,Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, CI 17200, Cocamidopropyl Betaine Directions Apply to hands and massage into a lather with a little water. Ensure complete coverage of hands before rinsing thoroughly with clean water. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately with plenty of water. If swallowed seek medical advice immediately and show this container or label. Store in a cool dark place. See more
